chunks.text: Course Support Contacts: ee-scheduling@eecs.berkeley.edu for EE class scheduling in Cory Hall. cs-scheduling@eecs.berkeley.edu for CS class scheduling in Soda Hall. cs-enrollments@eecs.berkeley.edu for questions about enrolling in CS classes. eecs-course-support@eecs.berkeley.edu for all administrative course support questions and requests (copying, textbooks, eGrade submissions, etc.). eecs-course-management@eecs.berkeley.edu for management of undergraduate student instructors and courses. inst@eecs.berkeley.edu for instructional computing (class accounts, instructional websites).

Course Support: EECS Main Office with Karla Thao at 253 Cory Hall, email eecs-course-support@eecs.berkeley.edu. She is the course support manager overseeing course material preparation and distribution. Teaching and Classroom Support includes course material support and copying services, textbook adoption, instructional library, and eGrade submission assistance, all via eecs-course-support@eecs.berkeley.edu.

Class Scheduling: Handles class schedules, classroom assignments, student statistics, and Heaven Points. EE Scheduling contact is Kait Guthrie at 205 Cory, phone +1 (510) 642-1786, email ee-scheduling@eecs.berkeley.edu. CS Scheduling and Enrollment contact is Cindy Conners at 379 Soda, phone +1 (510) 643-6002, email cs-scheduling@cs.berkeley.edu. CS Special Programs Enrollment contact is Savannah Scarlett at 379 Soda, phone +1 (510) 643-6002, email cs-enrollments@cs.berkeley.edu.

Undergraduate Course Instruction & Management Support: Director of Undergraduate Student Instruction is Christopher Hunn, overseeing undergraduate student instructors. He is at 341C Soda, phone +1 (510) 664-7546, email cthunn@cs.berkeley.edu, office hours Mon-Thurs 10am-12pm, 1pm-5pm. Course Managers support faculty in teaching roles, including logistics, administration, UGSI orientation, and student cases. Contact Krystle Simon at 315 Soda, email krystle@eecs.berkeley.edu.

Instructional Computing Support: Provides EECS instructional computing and computer lab support in Cory, Soda, and Sutardja Dai Halls for workstations, servers, accounts, email, and course home pages. Instructional Support Group Manager is Finsen Chiu at 378 Cory, phone +1 (510) 643-6141, email finsen@eecs.berkeley.edu. Senior System Administrators include Marcelino Enriquez at 333 Soda, email mars@eecs.berkeley.edu; Linda Huang at 384 Cory, phone +1 (510) 643-6096, email lindah@eecs.berkeley.edu; Steven Luo at 386 Cory, email s_luo@eecs.berkeley.edu. Offices at 378, 384 & 386 Cory, 333 Soda, email inst@eecs.berkeley.edu, phones +1 (510) 643-6141, +1 (510) 642-9543.
